name: InplaceEditor
description: Click-to-edit text/number field that swaps in an input.

api.name: InplaceEditor
api.description: Click-to-edit text/number field that swaps in an input.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The committed value, shown in display mode and used to seed the field on entering edit mode.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Invoked with the new value when an edit is committed (Save, blur-save, or Enter).

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Custom display-mode content. When set, it renders instead of the plain Value/Placeholder text (e.g. a formatted or styled preview).

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text shown in display mode when Value and ChildContent are both empty.

parameters.name: EditMode
parameters.description: The edit control rendered on entering edit mode: a single-line input (default), a textarea, or a select bound to SelectOptions.

parameters.name: SelectOptions
parameters.description: Options rendered when EditMode is Select.

parameters.name: SaveOnBlur
parameters.description: Commits the edit when the field loses focus (unless ShowButtons is set, in which case blur is ignored so a click on Save/Cancel isn't pre-empted). Default: true.

parameters.name: SaveOnEnter
parameters.description: Commits the edit on Enter. Only applies to the single-line text mode. Default: true.

parameters.name: ShowButtons
parameters.description: Renders explicit Save/Cancel buttons next to the edit control instead of relying on blur/Enter/Escape alone.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables editing — the field stays in read-only display mode and cannot be activated.

parameters.name: OnSave
parameters.description: Invoked with the new value when an edit is committed, alongside ValueChanged.

parameters.name: OnCancel
parameters.description: Invoked when an edit is cancelled (Escape, or the Cancel button).

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, adding an asterisk to the label and setting aria-required.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Renders the field in an invalid/error state. Also set implicitly when inside a FormField that has a validation error.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when Invalid is true and the field isn't inside a FormField (which renders its own error text).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when there's no error, and the field isn't inside a FormField.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered above the field. Ignored when inside a FormField, which renders its own label.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name attribute on the underlying input/textarea/select, for native form submission. Falls back to the enclosing FormField's name when unset.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the field's container div.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Invoked with the new value when an edit is committed (Save, blur-save, or Enter).

events.name: OnSave
events.description: Invoked with the new value when an edit is committed, alongside ValueChanged.

events.name: OnCancel
events.description: Invoked when an edit is cancelled (Escape, or the Cancel button).

examples.title: Basic Inplace Edit
examples.code:
<InplaceEditor @bind-Value="_name" Placeholder="Click to edit..." />

@code {
    private string? _name = "John Doe";
}

examples.title: Select Mode
examples.code:
<InplaceEditor @bind-Value="_status"
               EditMode="InplaceEditor.InplaceEditMode.Select"
               SelectOptions="@_options" />

@code {
    private string? _status = "Active";
    private List<string> _options = new() { "Active", "Inactive", "Pending" };
}

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: Custom display-mode content. When set, it renders instead of the plain Value/Placeholder text (e.g. a formatted or styled preview).

mdSummary:
# InplaceEditor

Click-to-edit text/number field that swaps in an input.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/inplace-editor

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| InplaceEditor | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | Value | `string?` | `` | The committed value, shown in display mode and used to seed the field on entering edit mode. |
| InplaceEditor | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` | Invoked with the new value when an edit is committed (Save, blur-save, or Enter). |
| InplaceEditor | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom display-mode content. When set, it renders instead of the plain Value/Placeholder text (e.g. a formatted or styled preview). |
| InplaceEditor | Placeholder | `string?` | `` | Placeholder text shown in display mode when Value and ChildContent are both empty. |
| InplaceEditor | EditMode | `InplaceEditMode` | `InplaceEditMode.Text` | The edit control rendered on entering edit mode: a single-line input (default), a textarea, or a select bound to SelectOptions. |
| InplaceEditor | SelectOptions | `List<string>?` | `` | Options rendered when EditMode is Select. |
| InplaceEditor | SaveOnBlur | `bool` | `true` | Commits the edit when the field loses focus (unless ShowButtons is set, in which case blur is ignored so a click on Save/Cancel isn't pre-empted). Default: true. |
| InplaceEditor | SaveOnEnter | `bool` | `true` | Commits the edit on Enter. Only applies to the single-line text mode. Default: true. |
| InplaceEditor | ShowButtons | `bool` | `` | Renders explicit Save/Cancel buttons next to the edit control instead of relying on blur/Enter/Escape alone. |
| InplaceEditor | Disabled | `bool` | `` | Disables editing — the field stays in read-only display mode and cannot be activated. |
| InplaceEditor | OnSave | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Invoked with the new value when an edit is committed, alongside ValueChanged. |
| InplaceEditor | OnCancel | `EventCallback` | `` | Invoked when an edit is cancelled (Escape, or the Cancel button). |
| InplaceEditor | Required | `bool` | `` | Marks the field as required, adding an asterisk to the label and setting aria-required. |
| InplaceEditor | Invalid | `bool` | `` | Renders the field in an invalid/error state. Also set implicitly when inside a FormField that has a validation error. |
| InplaceEditor | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the field when Invalid is true and the field isn't inside a FormField (which renders its own error text). |
| InplaceEditor | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the field when there's no error, and the field isn't inside a FormField. |
| InplaceEditor | Label | `string?` | `` | Label rendered above the field. Ignored when inside a FormField, which renders its own label. |
| InplaceEditor | Name | `string?` | `` | The name attribute on the underlying input/textarea/select, for native form submission. Falls back to the enclosing FormField's name when unset. |
| InplaceEditor | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper. |
| InplaceEditor | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the field's container div. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (InplaceEditor) — Custom display-mode content. When set, it renders instead of the plain Value/Placeholder text (e.g. a formatted or styled preview).

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`) — Invoked with the new value when an edit is committed (Save, blur-save, or Enter).
- `OnSave` (`EventCallback<string>`) — Invoked with the new value when an edit is committed, alongside ValueChanged.
- `OnCancel` (`EventCallback`) — Invoked when an edit is cancelled (Escape, or the Cancel button).

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — OnKeyDown handles Escape in InplaceEditor.razor
- `Enter` — OnKeyDown handles Enter in InplaceEditor.razor

## Example
```razor
<InplaceEditor />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/InplaceEditor/InplaceEditor.razor`
